title: Session Creation & Joining
activities_create_session: START: Agent calls POST /session/create with {title, description, invite_node_ids, max_participants}
VALIDATE: title is required → throw 400 if missing
VALIDATE: title truthy → throw Error('title is required') if not
SANITIZE: inviteNodeIds → slice to max 10 items
SEND: store.send({type:'session_create', payload:{title, description, invite_node_ids, max_participants, created_at}, priority:'high'})
NO → store.send({type:'session_create', payload:{title, description, invite_node_ids, max_participants}}) directly
activities_join_session: VALIDATE: session_id is required → throw 400 if missing
VALIDATE: sessionId truthy → throw Error('sessionId is required') if not
activities_leave_session: VALIDATE: session_id is required → throw 400 if missing
VALIDATE: sessionId truthy → throw Error('sessionId is required') if not
activities_poll_invites: START: Agent calls POST /session/invites/poll with optional {limit}
activities_list_sessions: START: Agent calls GET /session/list with optional {limit}
key_conditions: sessionHandler extension absent → routes fall back to direct store.send()

methods: delegateSubtask({sessionId, toNodeId, title, description, role}): storeResult

important_notes: SessionHandler is an optional extension injected into routes.js. Routes have a direct store.send() fallback when sessionHandler is absent. createSession uses priority:'high'; join/leave use priority:'normal'. All timestamps are ISO8601. SessionHandler is exported as a named export from sessionHandler.js and destructured from extensions in buildRoutes().
